stemHtml: Select the correct option regarding the shape and location of a clearway.

options.a: It is rectangular, found at the end of TORA.
options.b: It is trapezoidal with a length of at least half the TORA.
options.c: It is rectangular, located at the end of the TORA with a length of at least half the TORA.
options.d: It is semi-circular, found at the end of the TORA.
